issue.message: Call requires permission which may be rejected by user: code should explicitly check to see if permission is available (with `checkPermission`) or explicitly handle a potential `SecurityException`

Must be one of: Player.PLAY_WHEN_READY_CHANGE_REASON_USER_REQUEST, Player.PLAY_WHEN_READY_CHANGE_REASON_AUDIO_FOCUS_LOSS, Player.PLAY_WHEN_READY_CHANGE_REASON_AUDIO_BECOMING_NOISY, Player.PLAY_WHEN_READY_CHANGE_REASON_REMOTE, Player.PLAY_WHEN_READY_CHANGE_REASON_END_OF_MEDIA_ITEM, Player.PLAY_WHEN_READY_CHANGE_REASON_SUPPRESSED_TOO_LONG
Call to `CredentialManager.getCredential` without use of `NoCredentialException`
Use of `:googleid` classes without use of `GoogleIdTokenCredential.createFrom`

This folder configuration (`v26`) is unnecessary; `minSdkVersion` is 26. Merge all the resources in this folder into `mipmap-anydpi`.
Very long vector path (6415 characters), which is bad for performance. Considering reducing precision, removing minor details or rasterizing vector.
Prefer `mutableIntStateOf` instead of `mutableStateOf`

Prefer `mutableFloatStateOf` instead of `mutableStateOf`
